creator: work+freebsd@vvv.kiev.ua
text:
Binary package compat11x-amd64 for 11.X (abi=FreeBSD:11:amd64) is too old. Available version - 11.0.1100122.20170608. There are no libssl.so.8 and libcrypto.so.8. Current port version - 11.2.1102000.20181014, both files are present.

Please, update binary package to the last version.
